lesson.lesson_title: Alice Talks About Her Best Friend

sentences.sentence_en: Alice, how about you? Do you have a best friend?
sentences.sentence_vi: Alice, còn bạn thì sao? Bạn có bạn thân không?
sentences.sentence_ipa: /ˈælɪs haʊ əˈbaʊt ju du ju hæv ə bɛst frɛnd/
accepted_answers: alice how about you do you have a best friend

sentences.sentence_en: Yes, I do. Her name’s Anna.
sentences.sentence_vi: Có. Tên cô ấy là Anna.
accepted_answers: yes i do her names anna
yes i do her name is anna

sentences.sentence_vi: Bạn gặp cô ấy khi nào?

sentences.sentence_en: It was in our freshman year – so, three years ago.
sentences.sentence_vi: Đó là năm nhất – tức là ba năm trước.
sentences.sentence_ipa: /ɪt wəz ɪn aʊr ˈfrɛʃmən jɪr soʊ θri jɪrz əˈɡoʊ/
accepted_answers: it was in our freshman year so three years ago

sentences.sentence_en: Did you meet in high school?
sentences.sentence_vi: Hai bạn gặp nhau ở trung học à?
accepted_answers: did you meet in high school

sentences.sentence_en: No, freshman year of college. We’re on the same team.
sentences.sentence_vi: Không, năm nhất đại học. Chúng tôi cùng một đội.
sentences.sentence_ipa: /noʊ ˈfrɛʃmən jɪr əv ˈkɑlɪdʒ wɪr ɑn ðə seɪm tim/
accepted_answers: no freshman year of college were on the same team
no freshman year of college we are on the same team

sentences.sentence_en: Soccer. We’re both on our college soccer team.
sentences.sentence_vi: Bóng đá. Cả hai chúng tôi đều ở trong đội bóng đá của trường.
sentences.sentence_ipa: /ˈsɑkər wɪr boʊθ ɑn aʊr ˈkɑlɪdʒ ˈsɑkər tim/
accepted_answers: soccer were both on our college soccer team
soccer we are both on our college soccer team

sentences.sentence_en: Soccer’s a great game. Do you like to watch soccer, too?
sentences.sentence_vi: Bóng đá là một môn tuyệt vời. Bạn cũng thích xem bóng đá chứ?
sentences.sentence_ipa: /ˈsɑkərz ə ɡreɪt ɡeɪm du ju laɪk tə wɑʧ ˈsɑkər tu/
accepted_answers: soccers a great game do you like to watch soccer too
soccer is a great game do you like to watch soccer too

sentences.sentence_en: Well, not really. But Anna and I talk about all kinds of sports when we’re together.
sentences.sentence_vi: Không hẳn. Nhưng Anna và tôi nói về nhiều môn thể thao khi ở cùng nhau.
sentences.sentence_ipa: /wɛl nɑt ˈrɪli bət ˈænə ænd aɪ tɔk əˈbaʊt ɔl kaɪndz əv spɔrts wɛn wɪr təˈɡɛðər/
accepted_answers: well not really but anna and i talk about all kinds of sports when were together
well not really but anna and i talk about all kinds of sports when we are together

sentences.sentence_en: OK, thanks, Alice. And good luck in your next game!
sentences.sentence_vi: Được rồi, cảm ơn Alice. Chúc bạn may mắn trong trận đấu tới!
sentences.sentence_ipa: /oʊˈkeɪ θæŋks ˈælɪs ænd ɡʊd lʌk ɪn jʊr nɛkst ɡeɪm/
accepted_answers: ok thanks alice and good luck in your next game
